content.en:
Moonmark instinctively felt that there was something wrong with this, but the news that came was indeed that the patriarch of the Ancient Demon Ape Clan had ambushed and killed the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, causing the anger of the Ancient Mountain Lord, and only then did he erase the Ancient Demon Ape Clan.

The Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor has fallen, this is a certain thing, this kind of Eight Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Genius Falls from the Ancient Era that have survived to this day are a big thing that shakes the entire territorial sea sea, and it is impossible to talk nonsense.

So, the message is 100% correct.

"Unless that guy has an unimaginable opportunity during this time and has ascended to the sky in one step and become an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm primeval genius, there is no way to explain it!"

Moonmark thought to herself.

Although many Blood Transformation Realm and primeval-level geniuses knew about this matter, they didn't suspect anything, they only felt that it was a pity that the patriarch of the primeval demon ape clan had died.

An ancient-level genius of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm was able to kill the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, what a demon this was, he was actually wiped out by the Ancient Mountain Lord.

Of course, there were also a few primordial-level geniuses who had doubted Ye Tian.

"The Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor just chased and killed the Endless Heavenly Ancestor in front of him, and he was killed?"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was curious.

He was one of the few primeval-level geniuses who knew that Ye Tian had a clone, and he even suspected that Ape Fu was Ye Tian's clone pretending.

However, when he learned that in the battle that day, Ape Fu had used the Ancient Astral Light Technique and the Ancient Golden Body Technique, which were different from the Ancient Technique cultivated by the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, so he didn't have such suspicions.

But he still didn't understand where the primeval demon ape ape Fu came from to dare to kill the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, and he succeeded, it was simply very strange.

......

Dark Sea.

Ye Tian and Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor were chatting and drinking at the same time.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, if I didn't understand how the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was killed, otherwise I would really doubt that you did it!" Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor said with a smile.

"I haven't left the Black Wind Sea, and this matter has nothing to do with me. "

It was impossible for Ye Tian to admit that this matter had something to do with him, otherwise if it was spread out, the Taigu Mountain Lord might do something to him.

In short, he barely revealed his identity, no one could find him, and even if he was suspicious, it was only suspicion.

It is impossible for the Lord of the Ancient Mountains to kill the Dark Sea because of the slightest suspicion.

The Dark Sea is also a strength that is enough to compete with the Taigu Mountain, and the Lord of the Taigu Mountain will not casually break into the Dark Sea.

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor didn't think too much about it, in other words, even if it was really Ye Tian who killed Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, as long as he didn't get caught, it would be fine.

The Dark Sea can still keep the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, and the Ancient Mountain Lord can't mess around.

In the following years, Ye Tian spent a very peaceful day, every day was to comprehend the ancient golden texts and cultivate, and did not do other time.

As a large number of primeval gold inscriptions were comprehended by him, he also successively created other top-notch primeval bone techniques.

As a result, he integrated all the immeasurable bones in his left arm into the top primeval bone technique, so that these immeasurable bones completed the bone transformation and further improved his physical body.

It can be said that although Ye Tian has not broken through to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, his strength is steadily improving.

"It's really difficult to get from eight times to nine times to nine times in the blood change realm, even a Heavenly Ancestor like the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, with a master like the Ancient Mountain Lord, can't break through to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, otherwise he will break through to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and I am not his opponent. Ye Tian thought to himself.

He also asked the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor how he could break through to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and the answer he got was the accumulation of countless chances.

Just like the golden substance he obtained from the ancient gold tablet before, the actual name is Taihe Golden Water, which is also an incomparably precious resource.

It even has a certain effect on the eight Blood Transformation Realms, but it's a pity that he has now exhausted his refining, and he still hasn't refined to the limit of the Eight Blood Transformation Realms.

"If you want to improve your cultivation to the extreme of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm in a short period of time, it's very difficult, it's very difficult, an ancient-level genius like the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor has been cultivating since the primeval era, and they don't know how many million primeval epochs they have cultivated. And my cultivation years are really only a few primeval eras. "

Ye Tian quickly immersed himself in his state of mind, no longer thinking about quickly breaking through to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, but continued to slowly comprehend the Ancient Golden Inscription and create the top Ancient Bone Technique.

In this way, you can also improve your strength, and you don't necessarily have to break through to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm.

Another long time has passed.

Ye Tian created one top-notch primeval bone technique after another, and the immeasurable bones on his body completed bone transformation, and his strength was steadily improving.

this day.

The Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor informed Ye Tian that the Dark Sea was about to start a high-level meeting, and let him go over as well.

After all, as an ancient-level genius of the Eight Blood Transformation Realms, he is also a well-deserved high-level.

......

In the depths of the Dark Sea, in an ethereal palace, the Eight Blood Transformation Realm Breaking Heavenly Ancestors, the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Geniuses, and the Eight Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Geniuses all appeared one after another.

It can be said that the most rubbish who is qualified to come here is a boundary-breaking genius of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm.

Ordinary Eight Blood Transformation Realms are not eligible to participate in such a meeting.

But if it was in the outside world, eight Blood Transformation Realms were enough to be called the leader of a top force, such as the White Shadow Elephant Clan and the Ancient Demon Ape Clan.

This is the difference between the top overlord-level forces and the ordinary top-level forces, the top-level overlord-level forces are too powerful.

It was also the first time for Ye Tian to see so many high-level gatherings, and it was obvious that something big had happened.

Airplanes!!!!

A cloud of darkness shrouded in a figure.

At this time, one after another high-ranking officials said respectfully: "Lord of Darkness!"

The Lord of Darkness, the leader of the Dark Sea, is also an existence in the Bone Transformation Realm, and is a powerhouse at the same level as the Lord of the Ancient Mountain.

"Sit down!"

The Lord of Darkness spoke.

At this time, the Lord of Darkness looked at Ye Tian: "This is the Endless Heavenly Ancestor!"

"The Endless Heavenly Ancestor has seen the Lord of Darkness!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"I also know that you joined the Dark Sea, but you were in retreat before, so you didn't show up!" the Lord of Darkness didn't say much, and was quick to mention the true purpose of the meeting.

"Everyone, the ruins of the rift are about to open!"

The Lord of Darkness.

"What, the ruins of the boundary rift have opened, which ruin of the boundary rift?" the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor and the others were surprised and curious, and at the same time full of anticipation.

For them, the ruins of the boundary crack represent miracles and hope!

Under normal circumstances, the ruins of the boundary rift would only be opened once in hundreds of thousands of primeval eras, and they had been waiting for a long time!
